holdings.infoBox: DURA is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are Philip Morris International stock at 5.07%, Bank of America at 4.93%, The Coca-Cola Company at 4.91%, Texas Instruments at 4.78%, and Merck & Co. at 4.73%.

overview.description: The VanEck Durable High Dividend ETF (DURA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Dividend Valuation index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of US firms that are screened for dividend yield, financial health, and valuation. DURA was launched on Oct 30, 2018 and is issued by VanEck.
